Package kp.company.client.side

Class EmployeeClientSideTests

java.lang.Object
kp.company.TestsBase
kp.company.client.side.base.ClientSideTestsBase
kp.company.client.side.EmployeeClientSideTests
@SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=RANDOM_PORT) class EmployeeClientSideTests extends ClientSideTestsBase
Client side tests for employee.
The server is started.
